reviews.comment:
Visited Caffee Coffee Island recently and had a great experience. The ambience is cozy and modern—perfect for chilling or casual meetings.
Special thanks to Mr. Karan and Mr. Yuvraj for their warm  and attentive service. They made the visit even more pleasant.
Coffee quality was excellent, well-brewed, and served fresh. Overall, a great place to relax and enjoy good coffee.
Definitely worth visiting again!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the lovely feedback! We’re glad you enjoyed the cozy ambience, great coffee, and warm service. We truly appreciate your kind words and look forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.comment: Worst Experience ever. The Quantity of food is very less compared to the price. The Service is very bad.. They didn't even inform about the offers available. The staffs and their behaviour was worst

reviewReply.comment:
We’re sorry to hear this and truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. It’s never our intention to leave our guests disappointed.

We’d love the chance to understand this better and help. Please reach out to us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you.

reviews.comment: Worst experience. None of the items were available. Service is worst. I would jump off before going back to this place.

reviewReply.comment:
We’re really sorry you felt this way and understand how frustrating that must have been. Running into limited availability and service issues can definitely spoil the experience, and we truly regret that.

Thanks for taking the time to share this with us, it helps us do better. If you’re open to it, please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in. We’d honestly love the chance to connect and make things right.

reviews.comment:
I booked a table Amanora Coffee Island for 12:30 afternoon.
Only coffee was available. I was told that food will be available only after 3:00 pm. Waste of my time.
reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/10866130483095140789/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205SVR6VkZhRFUxVkZoSVIwNXJSakYwY0ZabVdHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Nice place to relax with good coffee and food. Visited Coffee Island recently and had a really pleasant experience. The place has a nice, relaxed vibe and comfortable seating, perfect for sitting back and enjoying a coffee without feeling rushed.

We tried a few drinks and food items. The coffee was smooth and well made, not too bitter and not overly sweet. The hot chocolate / creamy drinks were comforting and nicely balanced. The pancakes were soft and fluffy, just the right amount of sweetness. We also had a rice bowl, which was filling and tasted fresh — good portion size as well.

Service was quick and staff were polite. The place was clean and well maintained, even when it was busy. Overall, Coffee Island is a good spot if you’re looking for decent coffee, light meals, and a calm place to spend some time. Would definitely visit again.

P.S.:- Don't forget to download there apps and collect leafs

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing such a detailed and thoughtful review! We’re glad you enjoyed the coffee, food, relaxed vibe, and quick service. It’s great to know you had a pleasant experience overall. We truly appreciate the recommendation and look forward to welcoming you again soon.
